name: Schneider Electric Security Bulletin: Modicon M340/M580 RCE (CVE-2024-12345)
description: Schneider Electric has published a security bulletin confirming a critical buffer overflow in Modicon M340 and M580 PLCs (firmware < 3.40). The vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote code execution via the Modbus/TCP interface. Patch MODM340-3.40 is available. Customers should apply the patch immediately or isolate affected PLCs from the network.
